posts.author: bbbhutra
posts.text: The Economic Times Jupiter Wagons arm signs 10-year rail wheel supply pact with Europe’s... Jupiter Tatravagonka Railwheel Factory has secured a significant 10-year supply agreement with European rail wagon manufacturer Tatravagonka a.s. Commercial supplies are set to begin by the end of 2027. This deal positions India as a major exporter...

posts.text: NBM Media Pvt. Ltd. Jupiter Electric Mobility Secures 110 MWh BESS Orders Jupiter Electric Mobility Pvt. Ltd. (JEM), a subsidiary of Jupiter Wagons Limited, has signed Memorandums of Understanding (MoUs) with renewable energy developers

posts.author: bbbhutra
posts.text: Whalesbook – 11 May 26 Jupiter Wagons' CAPEX Delayed as CARE Flags Mixed Fund Use Jupiter Wagons faces delays in using QIP funds for capital projects, CARE Ratings reports. While other funds are deployed, a ₹403cr QIP shows no CAPEX utilization. What investors are watching.
